steps.title: Identify the grammatical structure on each side of the blank
steps.content: Before the blank: a noun completing the object of a preposition within an independent clause. After the blank: an independent clause with its own subject and verb.

steps.title: Apply the rule for joining independent clauses
steps.content: A semicolon joins two independent clauses here, making option A correct. The other options either misapply a relative pronoun, create a comma splice, or leave clauses unseparated. That matches choice A — A is correct.
